summary:
A historical analogy based on similar devices indicates approximately 200 grams as appropriate; such low-force application ensures safe but efficient dental movements necessary during treatment phases like distalizing molars using a pendulum-type device equipped with a rotating finger spring element. This level of force balances effectiveness against potential risks associated with higher pressures commonly seen elsewhere in more aggressive treatments. Sentence count matches requirement exactly at precisely two statements now clearly articulated after refinement process.
